items.docs:
**Deprecation notice:** Webhooks v1 will be deprecated in March 2026. Please use the Developer Center in the Fireblocks Console to upgrade to Webhooks v2, which offers improved reliability, performance, and observability.

Resends all failed webhook notifications.

</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor.

info.name: Resend webhooks for a transaction by ID

params.name: txId
params.description: The ID of the transaction for webhooks

items.docs:
**Deprecation notice:** Webhooks v1 will be deprecated in March 2026. Please use the Developer Center in the Fireblocks Console to upgrade to Webhooks v2, which offers improved reliability, performance, and observability.

Resends webhook notifications for a transaction by its unique identifier.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor.

params.name: order
params.description: ASC / DESC ordering (default DESC)

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Cursor of the required page

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items on the page

items.docs:
Get all webhooks (paginated).

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

Creates a new webhook, which will be triggered on the specified events

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: webhookId
params.description: The unique identifier of the webhook

items.docs:
Delete a webhook by its ID.

info.name: Get all notifications by webhook ID

params.name: order
params.description: ASC / DESC ordering (default DESC)

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Sort by field (id, createdAt, updatedAt, status, eventType, resourceId)

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Cursor of the required page

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of items on the page

params.name: startTime
params.description: Start time in milliseconds since epoch to filter by notifications created after this time (default 31 days ago)

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time in milliseconds since epoch to filter by notifications created before this time (default current time)

params.name: statuses
params.description: List of notification statuses to filter by

params.name: events
params.description: List of webhook event types to filter by

params.name: resourceId
params.description: Resource ID to filter by

items.docs:
Get all notifications by webhook ID (paginated).

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: webhookId
params.description: The ID of the webhook

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The ID of the notification

Resend all failed notifications for a webhook in the last 24 hours.
